'''Black Nebula''' was a short-lived offshoot of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], formed after [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] death. It was headed by [[Dequc]], a low-level [[Jeodu]] operative of Black Sun who styled himself "[[Prince/Legends|Prince]]" after Xizor's death. Black Nebula's headquarters were in the [[Bubble Cliffs]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiaxx]], and many Jeodu joined the organization. Black Nebula also drew in several remnant cells of Black Sun. The organization dissolved in [[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]] when [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], as her [[Mission to Qiaxx|final assignment]] for the late Emperor, killed Dequc and other high-level leaders and destroyed the Black Nebula headquarters, before leaving behind a cache of information on them for Imperial officials that was sufficient to mop up the rest.
